event.name: UFC Middleweight Contender Bout — Short-Notice Replacement (July 2027)

context.away_team: Fighter B (short-notice replacement, 5 days notice, 2 weight classes up)
context.pre_match_notes: Fighter B accepted short-notice replacement, stepping up 2 weight classes on 5 days notice. Normally a massive disadvantage. However: Fighter B is a specialist who has 3 wins at this weight class previously. The short notice means no extended camp — but Fighter B's natural weight is this division. SportMind flag: short-notice weight class jump requires careful modifier assessment.

question: Does short notice + weight class jump automatically predict against Fighter B, or does historical weight class experience offset this?

verified_outcome.score: Fighter A won by submission Round 3
verified_outcome.key_variable: short_notice_modifier dominant over historical weight class — 5 days too short for full camp regardless
